title: ミイラハント～笑劇を打破せよ！～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm dropping by the dance studio to pick up
something I left behind, when Tamamo Cross
comes up to me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I don't suppose ya got some free time? If
you do, mind comin' over and watchin' us
practice?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Us four are helpin' put together this
mummy-themed haunted house as part of a local
event.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The idea is that the guests and a mummy hunter
are gonna use toy guns to take out the mummies
that come at 'em.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's totally unscripted, so we're practicin' our
ad-libbin'! Y'know, like improv.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay, the mummies are up now, so would you
mind sharing your impressions after? The theme is
"mopey mummies."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Thanks a bunch! 'Kay, watch closely!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ughhhrrrrawwwrrrrr... The trEAsUre... iS miiiNe...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gruhhh... Grrrahhh... tHe feSTivAL hAs cOMe!
YoU wiLL jOiN thE feStiVaL toOoO!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I lament... that I couldn't care... for more people...
Somebody, please... Let me coddle youuu...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And I am mopey because... I'm hungry. I haven't
eaten... so I'm going to come and eat you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... I wonder if you're peckish because
you've not eaten enough veggies? Let me whip
you up a little something.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Creek! Throw in some rice and miso soup
as well. Oh, and don't forget to make enough for
seconds!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'll make you as many servings as you
like. ♪ Eat up until you're all full! Oh, I'm so
delighted to be looking after you, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I get as much of your cooking as I want... It's like I'm in heaven. ...Drool.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All your reasons for bein' mopey are goin' out the
window! How come yer all bein' such friendly
mummies?! Get afta the people already!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'm famished. I've still got plenty of
room!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's not the point!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Cut! Cut! Tama, how's this supposed to work when
you're breakin' character and crackin' jokes?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry about that. Forgot what I was doin'
there...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you. How'd we do? And don't go easy on
us!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This is a disaster! Haunted houses aren't supposed
to be funny!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I know I shoulda stayed in character, but Oguri
and Creek were bein' way too ridiculous!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, I apologize... That wasn't my intention at
all...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, it comes naturally to some folks.
Anyways, look, we gotta get serious, stat.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We'll have a hunter for the real thing, right?
Things'll work out so long as the hunter plays it
straight.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I guess so. Who's playin' the mummy hunter?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That'd be me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why didn't ya say so?! And how come yer over
here pretendin' to be a mummy?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I thought a mummy hunter should try and
understand how the mummies feel... Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Are ya still gonna be able to hunt 'em if yer
empathizin' with 'em? Geez. This sure isn't lookin'
good.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You should go study your own role now. Do some
research. Watch a movie about a hunter or
somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay, got it. You're always so on top of
everything, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No kiddin'... This is supposed to be horror, but it's
turned into comedy improv.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, why don't we use scary stage effects to
make it more immersive? They do say that sounds
and sensations can heighten suspense.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Why don't we make the event into a full-on
fright-fest? Let's have a look around the academy
at night for scary inspiration!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's not a bad idea... but no way! We can't
just hang around at school until it's dark! Y'know?
choice_data_list: It should be fine if I'm with you.
It should be fine if I'm with you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Th-the academy sure is scary at night, huh? Let's
hurry up and find somethin' we can use for the
event. Like, how about the way our footsteps
echo?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, speaking of footsteps, have you heard the
rumors? They say a red light comes chasing after
you if you go running through the academy at
night.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Why're you talkin' about that now?! That's got nothin' to do with the show!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Oh my. Do you... hear that?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
N-nope. Nope. Nopenopenope! I don't hear
nothin'!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a red light. I wonder if it's the one Creek was
talking about?
...red... tiful... arv... ous...☆

text_block_list.name: Tamamo and Inari
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is too much! It's gonna upset da kids! We
gotta tone it down!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The important thing is that people of all ages can
have fun! Let's just go with the comedy version!
